PHASE 1 · UI
AI Deepfake Detection

Is this image real?

Upload any photo. DeepShield analyzes it for AI generation, manipulation, and deepfake artifacts.

Drop an image here

or click to browse · JPG, PNG, WEBP

Phase 1 — UI only · Detection coming in Phase 2

Images never storedFree to useSupports JPG, PNG, WEBP

How it works

01
Upload
Drop any photo — portrait, screenshot, news image, anything.
02
Analyze
Our model scans for GAN artifacts, frequency anomalies, and inconsistencies.
03
Report
Get a confidence score and a breakdown of what signals were found.
DeepShield · Portfolio ProjectBuilt with Next.js · Tailwind · Python
